title: Nickel Headed to $20,000 as Indonesia Limits Production, EV Demand Surges

title: Can nickel prices hit $25,000 in 2026?
summary: Indonesia, producing two-thirds of the world's nickel, has signaled major supply cuts for 2026 by delaying mining permits and slashing output quotas, triggering a price rally to $16,500–$18,500 per ton. title: Will the nickel market rebalance in 2024?
summary: SFA (Oxford) estimates that global nickel supply excluding Indonesia could see closures equal to ~225 kt in 2024, reducing the market surplus by at least one-third. title: The world nickel market in 2025 and 2026 – five years of surpluses
summary: World primary nickel production is projected to increase by 7.9% in 2025, with global capacity estimated at 5.49 Mt across 565 operating mines and 273 smelters. title: Unleashing sustainable nickel production for a net zero future

title: Green nickel for sustainable electrification
